sentences.arabic: كَانَ نُورٌ يُحِبُّ مُشَارَكَةَ طَعَامِهِ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Nur je volio dijeliti hranu s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: Nour loved to share his food with others.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَكَلَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ كَانَ دَائِمًا يَعْرِضُ عَلَيْهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Kad bi jeo s prijateljima uvijek bi im nudio.
sentences.translationEn: When he ate with his friends he always offered them some.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الطَّعَامُ يَكْفِي لِلْجَمِيعِ إِذَا تَشَارَكْنَا.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Hrane ima dovoljno za sve ako dijelimo.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Food is enough for all if we share.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ هَذَا الْخُلُقَ مِنَ تَعَالِيمِ الدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Tu osobinu naučio je iz vjerskih učenja.
sentences.translationEn: He learned this character trait from religious teachings.
